response.justification: Bogdan brings over 15 years of robust software engineering experience, directly matching the core stack of TypeScript, Node.js, and React. His recent, highly relevant work with AI-agent infrastructure, coupled with an exceptional background in testing frameworks, cloud deployments, and backend architecture, makes him an outstanding fit for this senior role.
strengths: Extensive experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud deployments
Recent, highly relevant experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tools
Exceptional background in software testing, including TDD and building custom test runners
concerns: Missing explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest, though transferable skills are evident
Heavy focus on niche languages (DLang) in several mid-career roles
Some shorter tenures in earlier career phases
